scope: NATIVE wave batch A2 = M08L (graphics: worldDraw + overrules/grips) + M08M (OPM properties + reactors). Sub-batch of the program's MERGE-M08-NATIVE.

pre_merge_integration.verified: m08l* (AcGiWorldDraw collector + AcRxOverrule) + m08m* (AcRxProperty + AcDb*Reactor) coexist in one TU, no static-symbol collision

drift_tracked.issue: These are in a family HasOp+Dispatch but are NOT registry op ids (teammate-invented). Harmless dead handlers (router never routes a non-registry op). m08m spent 3 of its 44 on these instead of registry ops, so a few registry property.* ops may remain catalogued.
drift_tracked.disposition: Batch C cleanup sweep: remove the 4 spurious HasOp+Dispatch branches + test entries, rebuild, and re-check whether any missed registry property.* ops are now feasible. Does NOT affect closure_gate (counts registry ops only).

key_findings.m08l_worlddraw: Real hostless AcGiWorldDraw collector (M08LCollectWorldDraw/Geometry/Traits/Context) driven by AcDbEntity::worldDraw(&collector) — view-independent graphics elaboration works hostless. viewportgeom deferred (needs a live AcGiViewportDraw viewport).
key_findings.m08l_no_dimstyle_overrule: overrule.dimstyle.install deferred: NO AcDbDimStyleOverrule class exists in ObjectARX 2027 (only Object/Properties/Osnap/Transform/Grip/Subentity/Highlight/HighlightState/Visibility/Geometry/Drawable/QueryX overrules).
key_findings.m08m_no_lnk2001: All property/reactor classes are standard exported ACBASE/ACDBCORE2D — no custom-class ::desc() touched, so the M08K LNK2001 wall was avoided. reactor monitor ops PROVE the callback fires (scratch modify in a rolled-back staged txn).
key_findings.teammate_idle_is_not_failure: A2 teammates emitted an early idle_notification during their SDK header de-risking phase (before writing code); a re-engagement nudge surfaced status and both then produced first-try / clean builds. An idle ping != done and != failed.

post_merge_gate.build: combined integration build exit 0 (above); reconcile changed no C++

closure_note: closure_gate honestly False: 230 catalogued remain (NATIVE-N 73 + VISLIVE 7 + FALLBACK 38 + deferred READ/WRITE 46 + A1/A2 attended deferrals + 4 drift + misc). M09 blocked.
next: User scope was 'A1 A2까지' — A1 + A2 now complete. Remaining per docs/M08_REMAINING_BATCH_PLAN.md: A3 (M08N 73, mostly attended), B (VISLIVE+FALLBACK 45), C (deferred-disposition sweep + the 4 drift), D (closure M08P/Q/R). Awaiting direction.
